title: oplismenus hirtellus subsp. psilostachys
intro: Oplismenus hirtellus subsp. psilostachys, also known as the hairy false barley, is a perennial grass-like plant belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Oplismenus hirtellus subsp. psilostachys include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
